steps.title: Identify the logical connection
steps.content: The passage describes how the volcanoes look (shield-like shape) and then immediately states how volcanologists classify them (shield volcanoes). The key signal is that the classification name matches and is explained by their appearance.

steps.title: Match the appropriate transition
steps.content:
”Fittingly” directly expresses that the volcano name is appropriate and well-suited to their appearance — they're called “shield volcanoes” because they actually look like shields.

The other choices introduce incorrect relationships: “Still” signals contrast, “Besides” adds unrelated information, and “Second” suggests enumeration.

That matches choice D — D is correct.
